title: Your Agent Doesn't Have an Email Address (Yet)
subtitle: 30+ repos are building identity, credentials, email, and payment infrastructure for agents as first-class entities. Scattered across 25 subcategories with no name. Here's the map.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Agent-native infrastructure: the emerging category of services designed for AI agents as first-class entities. Identity, email, credentials, payments, and gateways — 30+ repos across 25 subcategories.
